Aimee Lou Wood and Erin Doherty land double Bafta TV Award nominations Adolescence has the most nominations overall with 11, followed by A Thousand Blows with seven. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cvg04rp5vlko?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cvg04rp5vlko#0 Tue, 24 Mar 2026 12:24:08 GMT

Vets must publish prices and pet prescription fees to be capped at £21, watchdog saysVets will have to publish price lists for services under measures from the UK's competition watchdog. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cj32d05x702o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cj32d05x702o#0 Tue, 24 Mar 2026 09:47:18 GMT
Israel says it will take control of large buffer zone in southern LebanonThousands of displaced Lebanese residents will not be allowed to return home until northern Israel is safe, he says. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy91j9qwp4do?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy91j9qwp4do#0 Tue, 24 Mar 2026 12:51:01 GMT
Transgender girls told to leave Girlguiding groups by SeptemberIt follows an announcement in December that transgender members would be banned from joining. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cx2rn250ddjo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cx2rn250ddjo#0 Tue, 24 Mar 2026 12:25:44 GMT
Dame Shirley Bassey reveals she can no longer reply to fan mailThe singer, 89, said she was 'truly humbled' by the letters she had received during her 70-year career. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cnv8j064pnjo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cnv8j064pnjo#0 Tue, 24 Mar 2026 13:02:02 GMT
